title: Paramount importance: Supreme Court 3-judge Bench to decide validity of fact check units
description: The Supreme Court said on Tuesday that questions of paramount importance are involved in the case concerning the validity of Fact-Check Units (FCUs) mooted to identify false or fake news against the government on social media and online platforms [Union of India vs. Kunal Kamra]. A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant and Justices Joymalya Bagchi and R Mahadevan said that some of the online platforms act in a dangerous way which can be very damaging, and clear guidelines are req
